sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented. Game uses 16-color EGA graphics at 320×200 resolution.

special_mechanics.name: Wall Hang
special_mechanics.description: Cosmo can hang onto most walls with suction-cup hands

special_mechanics.name: Wall Climb
special_mechanics.description: Combining wall hanging with jumps allows Cosmo to climb to higher places

special_mechanics.name: Springs
special_mechanics.description: Interactive objects that make Cosmo jump higher

special_mechanics.name: Hovercraft
special_mechanics.description: Floating pads that allow Cosmo to fly

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay mechanics description and technical specifications (resolution, graphics format, code size). No quantitative physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, speeds) are documented in available sources.
